title: Create:Easy Andesite Creafting
description: This modification introduces alternative crafting paths for igneous rocks. Featuring balanced recipes for Andesite, Diorite, and Granite to streamline your building process and make common stone types more accessible.
body:
Easy Andesite Crafting – Streamline Your Building!

Tired of searching for hours just to get enough Andesite for your builds? Easy Andesite Crafting is a lightweight mod designed to make igneous stone types more accessible through logical and balanced crafting recipes. Whether you are playing with the "Create" mod or just in Vanilla, this mod fits perfectly into your workflow.
🛠 Features & Recipes

This mod introduces a smarter way to manage your stone resources:

    Efficient Andesite Production: Combine 1x Diorite and 1x Granite to receive 2x Andesite. No more wasting resources!

    Diorite via Iron: Need Diorite? You can now craft it by combining an Iron Nugget with base materials (like Cobblestone or Quartz).

    Granite from Gravel: Easily obtain Granite by processing Gravel or combining it with other stone types.

🚀 Why use this mod?

    Builder Friendly: Perfect for large-scale projects where you need thousands of Andesite blocks.

    Vanilla Compatible: While it works great alongside tech mods, it is fully functional in a standard Vanilla environment.

    Resource Balance: The recipes are designed to feel fair and integrated into the natural progression of the game.

📖 Technical Details

    Mod Namespace: create:easy_andesite_crafting

    Supported Versions: Minecraft 1.21.1
